scripts.dev:all: bun run --filter=web dev & bun run --filter=api dev
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter=web typecheck && bun run --filter=api typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter=web lint && bun run --filter=api lint
scripts.format: bun run --filter=web format && bun run --filter=api format
scripts.test: bun run --filter=web test && bun run --filter=api test
